title: ailanthus cacodendron
intro: Ailanthus cacodendron, also known as the Chinese tree-of-heaven or varnish tree, is a deciduous tree native to China that has been naturalized in many parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Ailanthus cacodendron has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ailanthus cacodendron include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
